name: Front
shortDescription: Integrates the Front shared inbox platform into FlowRunner workflows. Manage conversations across email, SMS, and chat channels, post internal team comments, maintain the contact and account directory, and react to new conversations, inbound messages, or comments.

actions.name: List Conversations
actions.description: Retrieves a paginated list of Front conversations with optional filters by inbox, tag, assignee, status, and free-text query (Front Query Language). Returns conversation metadata including subject, status, last message preview, and recipient.

actions.name: Get Conversation
actions.description: Retrieves a single conversation by ID with full metadata: subject, status, recipient, assignee, tags, links, custom fields, and counts.

actions.name: Search Conversations
actions.description: Searches conversations using Front Query Language. Supports operators like subject:, from:, is:unread, is:open, tag:, inbox:, before:/after:. Returns matching conversations sorted by relevance.

actions.name: Update Conversation
actions.description: Updates a conversation's status, assignee, inbox, or tags. Only the fields you provide are changed; leave others empty to keep them unchanged.

actions.name: Archive Conversation
actions.description: Convenience action that archives a conversation. Equivalent to Update Conversation with status set to archived.

actions.name: List Conversation Messages
actions.description: Retrieves the paginated list of messages in a conversation, with content, author, recipients, and direction (inbound/outbound).

actions.name: Send Message
actions.description: Sends a new outbound message through a Front channel, starting a new conversation. Supports email, SMS, and other channel types. Optionally attaches files by URL (each URL is fetched and uploaded as an attachment).

actions.name: Reply to Conversation
actions.description: Sends a reply message in an existing conversation. Uses the conversation's default channel unless a different one is specified. Optionally attaches files by URL.

actions.name: Get Attachment
actions.description: Downloads a Front message attachment and stores it in FlowRunner Files, returning a URL to the stored file. Accepts either an attachment id (e.g. fil_123) from a message's attachments list, or the attachment's full Front download URL.

actions.name: List Comments
actions.description: Retrieves internal comments on a conversation. Comments are team-only notes that are not visible to the customer.

actions.name: Add Comment
actions.description: Posts an internal comment on a conversation. Comments are team-only notes (not visible to the customer) and support @-mentions of teammates by ID.

actions.name: List Contacts
actions.description: Retrieves a paginated list of contacts in the Front workspace. Use Search Contacts to look up by handle (email/phone) instead.

actions.name: Get Contact
actions.description: Retrieves a single contact by ID with name, description, handles (email/phone/social), and linked accounts.

actions.name: Create Contact
actions.description: Creates a new contact with name, description, and handles. Handles is a comma-separated list in 'source:handle' format, e.g., 'email:jane@example.com,phone:+15551234567'.

actions.name: Update Contact
actions.description: Updates a contact's name and/or description. To modify handles use Front's specific handle endpoints (not exposed in v1).

actions.name: List Accounts
actions.description: Retrieves a paginated list of accounts (companies) in the Front workspace. Accounts group contacts under a single organization.

actions.name: Get Account
actions.description: Retrieves a single account by ID with name, description, domains, external ID, and custom fields.

actions.name: Create Account
actions.description: Creates a new account (company). Domains let Front automatically associate inbound emails from that domain with this account.

actions.name: Update Account
actions.description: Updates an account's name, domains, or description. Only the fields you provide are changed.

idealUseCases: Triaging new conversations by routing them to the right inbox, assignee, or tag based on content
Sending templated outbound emails or SMS replies through Front channels as part of a workflow
Posting internal comments to alert teammates when external systems report relevant events
Syncing Front contacts and accounts with a CRM so customer context stays consistent
Notifying chat channels or creating downstream tasks when new inbound customer messages arrive
agentIdeas: When a **Front** "On New Inbound Message" trigger fires, use **Gemini AI** "Generate Content" to draft a suggested reply, then call **Front** "Add Comment" to post the draft as an internal note for a teammate to send.
When a **HubSpot** "Create Contact" event creates a new lead, use **Front** "Create Contact" to mirror the contact and **Front** "Send Message" to deliver a welcome email through the support channel.
When a **Front** "On New Conversation" trigger fires with a VIP tag, use **Slack** "Send Message To Channel" to alert the on-call channel with the conversation subject and recipient.
